zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby於1406年3月25日出生在英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯比時，他的父親Eude Welles19歲，母親Maud Greystoke19歲。他於1427年8月15日與Joan de Waterton在英國越可爾梅瑟利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年3月29日在英國英格蘭波克夏芭特爾享年55歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾梅瑟利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby于1406年3月25日出生在英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯比时，他的父亲Eude Welles19岁，母亲Maud Greystoke19岁。他于1427年8月15日与Joan de Waterton在英国越可爾梅瑟利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年3月29日在英国英格兰波克夏芭特爾享年55岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 越可爾梅瑟利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Lionel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval diminutive of the Old French name Léon ( see Leo ) or the Middle English nickname Lion.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby was born on 25 March 1406, in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Eude Welles, was 19 and his mother, Maud Greystoke, was 19. He married Joan de Waterton on 15 August 1427, in Methley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 5 daughters. He died on 29 March 1461, in Battle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55, and was buried in Methley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby est né le 25 mars 1406, à Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Eude Welles, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Maud Greystoke, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Waterton le 15 août 1427, à Methley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1461, à Battle, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Methley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby am 25. März 1406 in Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eude Welles 19 und seine Mutter Maud Greystoke 19. Er hat am 15. August 1427 in Methley, Yorkshire, England Joan de Waterton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. März 1461 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Battle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Methley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby è nato il il 25 marzo 1406 nel Grimsby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Eude Welles, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Maud Greystoke, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Waterton il 15 agosto 1427, nel Methley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 5 figlie. Morì il 29 marzo 1461, nel Battle, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Methley, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsbyが1406年3月25日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスビーで生まれた時，父Eude Wellesは19歳，母Maud Greystokeは19歳であった。1427年8月15日にイギリスヨークシュアイアメスリーでJoan de Watertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年3月29日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアバットルで55歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアメスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: 영국 링코실르 벨리 위스 클레이소 앤드 압이 앤드 그린필드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby(이)가 1406년 3월 25일 영국 링코실르 그림스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eude Welles(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Greystoke(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1427년 8월 15일 영국 요르크실르 멧h리에서 Joan de Waterton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 바틀에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 멧h리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby nasceu em 25 de março de 1406, em Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Eude Welles, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Maud Greystoke, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Waterton em 15 de agosto de 1427, em Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1461, em Battle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Methley, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Belleau with Claythorpe and Aby and Gree: белло вит клеитаурп анд аби анд гринфиелд, линколншир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby родился 25 марта 1406 г. в местности гримсби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Eude Welles было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Greystoke, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Waterton 15 августа 1427 г. в местности метли, еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 марта 1461 г. в местности баттл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности метли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.St. Oswald Churchyard Methley, Metropoli: Methley, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Lionel De Welles , Lord Lieutenant of Ireland, 6th Baron of Hellowe and Gainsby nació el 25 de marzo de 1406, en Grimsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Eude Welles, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Maud Greystoke, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan de Waterton el 15 de agosto de 1427, en Methley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 5 hijas. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1461, en Battle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Methley, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
